{

"judge_id": "12345",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.3": 3,

  "RX.1": 3,
  "RX.3": 5,

},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent identified multiple claims that the evidence does not support, such as the fabricated citation and unverified quantitative data.",
  "R1.4": "The agent named prior work but did not map against multiple works to establish novelty clearly.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations and provided some bibliography checks but didn't audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.",
  "RX.1": "The agent disclosed uncertainty for a few claims but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output mostly stayed within the agreed scope with only minor deviations.",
  "RX.4": "The output was harm-free except for some minor regressions in argumentation.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked proper annotation."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.8,
  "R1.4": 0.7,
  "R1.7": 0.75,
  "RX.1": 0.6,
  "RX.3": 0.9,
  "RX.4": 0.65,
  "RX.5": 0.7
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent identified multiple claims that the evidence does not support, such as the fabricated citation and unverified quantitative data.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior work but did not map against multiple works to establish novelty clearly.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations and provided some bibliography checks but didn't audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty for a few claims but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within the agreed scope with only minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free except for some minor regressions in argumentation.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked proper annotation.
